# MuleSoft Tableau Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Tableau Connector documentation.
> See [Tableau Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tableau-specialist-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Tableau Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Tableau Connector 1.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tableau-specialist-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Tableau Connector 1.1 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tableau-specialist-connector/latest/tableau-specialist-connector-examples.md)
- [Tableau Connector 1.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/tableau-specialist-connector/latest/tableau-specialist-connector-reference.md)
